name: Floureton
type: A large trade and artisan city
description: A city world renown for its artists and artisans. The city has a large openess for wierness, this has attracted many eccentric talents. This in turn has sent the city in to a sort of renessiance.

name: Summerborn
type: A newly developed city with a lot of talents
description: A city born out of conflict and wilderness Summerborn is a city which has perservered a lot of troubles. It has become known as a hub for people looking for new lives and oppurtunities.
